    Help
    Outdated Quote Pricing Product prices in the catalog have changed since this quote was saved. You can update this quote to current pricing. The system will archive this version as a legacy copy before updating.
    COMPANY LOGO
    Construction Quoting Co.
    123 Builder Lane
    Suite A
    City, State Zip
    email@company.com | (555) 555-5555

    QUOTE

    Job ID: JOB-XYZ Quote Date: June 29, 2026 Expiration Date: July 29, 2026

    PREPARED FOR:

    John Client
    456 Residential Way
    City, State Zip
    (555) 123-4567
    john.client@example.com

    Standard construction contract guidelines apply. All pricing is finalized unless structural modifications are requested.

    Add Catalog Product

    Reactivate Quote

    To reactivate this legacy or archived quote, please set a new expiration date. This will open it for editing and mark its status as Pending.

    Confirm Status Change

    Are you sure you want to change the status of this quote?

    Email Quote to Customer

    Contact Support

    Connect to Supabase

    Provide your Supabase credentials to configure your cloud database. You can find these keys in your Supabase Dashboard under **Project Settings -> API**.

    MyBidBook

    Forgot Password?
    OR

    Reset Password

    Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

    MFA Verification

    Enter the 6-digit verification code from your authenticator app to secure your sign in.

    Create New Password

    Please enter your new secure password below to complete the reset process.

    Enable Authenticator App

    Scan the QR code below using your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.) to set up MFA.

    Or enter this key manually:

    Add Schedule Task

    If a dependency is selected, this task will automatically start after the dependency finishes.
    Leave blank to auto-schedule based on dependencies.

    Edit Schedule Task

    Leave blank to auto-schedule based on dependencies.

    Apply Master Template

    Select a master template to inject its tasks into the current project timeline.

    Session Expiring Soon

    For your security, your session will automatically log out in 60 seconds.

    Would you like to extend your session and stay signed in?
